overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a sunny urban park with wooden walkways, dense vegetation, and futuristic skyscrapers visible through the tree canopy. The character passes by various NPCs including a crouching man and pedestrians in casual futuristic clothing.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway with hedge border

events.description: pedestrians first become visible in the distance ahead on the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden pathway through the landscaped park area

entered.detail: elevated wooden deck pathway with visible plank texture
dense green hedge running along the right side of the path
tall trees with dense canopy creating dappled shadows
futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers visible through the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny wooden walkway bordered by dense hedges on the right and trees ahead. The camera moves forward through this urban park setting with futuristic buildings visible in the background, approaching distant pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: park walkway with seating area and gathering spot

events.description: entering area with green benches on the left and a group of NPCs ahead
passing close by the group with crouching man and standing woman

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a group of NPCs gathered on the walkway

notable_agents.action: man crouching down examining something on the ground
woman in red shirt standing and looking at the crouching man

entered.detail: modern green benches built into the left side wall structure
large boulder or rock formation in the center of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a group of NPCs gathered on the walkway, passing green benches on the left. A man is crouched on the ground while a woman in red stands nearby. The hedge row recedes to the mid-ground as the path continues toward a large rock formation.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded park walkway with dense tree canopy

agents.ego_description: walking past the woman in red who is standing and using her phone

notable_agents.action: woman in red shirt and denim shorts looking at her phone while standing

segments.scene_description: Moving past the woman in red who remains stationary on her phone, the camera continues through a more shaded section of the park. The hedge row disappears behind as the path curves slightly, with the large rock formation now receding into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: park walkway with stone stairs and elevated seating

events.description: stone stairs become prominent on the left side with people sitting

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path passing pedestrians with stairs visible on the left

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the stone stairs on the left side

entered.detail: wide stone staircase ascending on the left side with people seated

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues deeper into the park with stone stairs appearing on the left where people are seated. The tree canopy becomes denser creating more shade, and the large rock formation approaches again in the center distance as the path continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a sunny urban park that transitions from an open, hedge-lined walkway into a more shaded, wooded area. It begins on a bright wooden path bordered by dense hedges, moving toward distant pedestrians with futuristic skyscrapers looming in the background. As the camera advances, it passes green benches and a small group of NPCs, including a crouched man and a woman in red, while the hedge row recedes to reveal a large rock formation ahead. The scene then shifts into a more shaded section of the park as the path curves and the woman in red is left behind. Finally, the walkway leads deeper into the greenery where stone stairs appear on the left and the tree canopy thickens, casting deeper shadows as the camera continues toward the distant rock formation.
